name: anime-aggressors
description: Shōnen-inspired platform fighter with rollback-first simulation and optional Edge-IO wearables

scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @anime-aggressors/game-core && npm run typecheck -ws --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build -w @anime-aggressors/game-core && npm run test -ws --if-present
scripts.quality: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build:web
